description_long: This is a large, modern residential estate set on a spacious, landscaped plot surrounded by trees. The main house features a flat roof, clean geometric lines, and a predominantly white and black color palette, with extensive window arrangements and multiple entry points. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool, two detached outbuildings, and a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The grounds are meticulously organized, with trees lining the perimeter and scattered throughout the lawn, providing privacy and a park-like atmosphere. The main house appears to have a single story with a sprawling, open layout, and the outbuildings likely serve as garages or guest houses. The overall design emphasizes modern minimalism, outdoor living, and functional luxury.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious landscaped yard featuring a pool and outbuildings. The estate is surrounded by trees and designed for privacy and luxury.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house centered, with the pool to the left and two outbuildings to the right, all surrounded by trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, the pool on the left, and the outbuildings on the left side, with more visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view with the driveway leading to the main entrance, the pool on the far right, and outbuildings on the left, emphasizing the open lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool in the foreground, the main house behind it, and a single outbuilding to the right, with dense tree coverage at the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat approach with steps, a prominent door, and minimalistic overhang, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
